channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Rebel Audio is a new AI podcasting tool aimed at first-time creators
item.description: Rebel Audio is a new all-in-one podcasting tool that allows creators to record podcasts, edit, clip content for social, and publish episodes, all without ever leaving the platform.

item.title: 3 New IteraTools Endpoints: Google Calendar, JSON Validator & RSS Feed Parser
item.description: What's New in IteraTools We've been shipping fast. Here's a recap of the three most recent additions to IteraTools — the API toolkit designed for AI agents and developers who need reliable,...

item.title: EIP-7702 Broke Your tx.origin Check: How Ethereum's Pectra Upgrade Created a New Class of Account Confusion Vulnerabilities
item.description: On May 7, 2025, Ethereum's Pectra upgrade went live. Among 11 EIPs, one change quietly invalidated a security assumption that thousands of deployed contracts rely on: EIP-7702 made EOAs capable of...

item.title: I built 180+ free browser-side developer tools — no login, no data uploads
item.description: I got tired of having 12 different browser tabs open for developer tools. One tab for JSON formatting. Another for Base64. One for regex testing. One for JWT decoding. Another for converting that...

item.title: fastpdf2png: PDF to PNG at 1,500 pages/s with SIMD and PDFium
item.description: What My Project Does I was working on a document extraction pipeline and got frustrated with how slow PDF to PNG conversion was. PyMuPDF, MuPDF, ImageMagick, none of them were fast enough when...

item.title: 🚀 JavaScript Async/Await vs `.then()` : The Microtask & Event Loop Secret
item.description: Ever seen this and wondered why the output changes just by reordering lines? async function hi() { return "there"; } // Version A const waitedhi = await hi(); console.log(waitedhi); hi().then(res...

item.title: I Deleted 1,462 Lines from My Landing Page. Here's What Was in Them.
item.description: I built a SaaS landing page. Then I deleted half of it. Not because it was ugly. It wasn't. It had all the classics: scrolling logo clouds, "10,000+ brands served", glowing testimonials from Sarah...

item.title: Building a Multi-Tenant SaaS App with React and Node.js in 2026
item.description: Multi-tenancy is one of those SaaS architecture decisions that looks simple on day one and becomes your biggest constraint by year two. The decision you make early: How to isolate tenant data, how...

item.title: "Easter 2026 Is 18 Days Away — Turn 3 PTO Days Into a 10-Day Vacation"
item.description: It's mid-March. Easter is April 5th. And here's what most people don't realize: with just 3 strategically placed PTO days, you can get 10 consecutive days off for Easter 2026. Not in theory....

item.title: Introducing Frankie — The Programming Language — “It’s alive!” 🧟⚡

item.title: Weird Nintendo never went away
item.description: Nintendo has been playing it safe of late, whether it's the conservative nature of its Switch successor or the squeaky-clean image presented in its museum. As the company has expanded its...

item.title: PSA: Hackers can raid iOS 18 with an infected link
item.description: If you've been putting off an update to iOS 26, now might be the time to do it. On Wednesday, security researchers published findings on a new hacking tool that targets iPhones running iOS 18.4 to...

item.title: The Gemini-powered features in Google Workspace that are worth using
item.description: From summarizing emails, drafting content, organizing data, and tracking meetings, here are all the best Gemini features in Google Workspace.

item.title: This startup wants to make enterprise software look more like a prompt
item.description: The company has raised $12 million in seed funding to build an AI operating system for enterprise.

item.title: Interlock Ransomware Exploits Cisco FMC Zero-Day CVE-2026-20131 for Root Access
item.description: Amazon Threat Intelligence is warning of an active Interlock ransomware campaign that's exploiting a recently disclosed critical security flaw in Cisco Secure Firewall Management Center (FMC)...

item.title: Sequen snags $16M to bring TikTok-style personalization tech to any consumer company
item.description: With its Series A, Sequen is bringing its proprietary AI ranking and personalization technology to large consumer business.

item.title: The best early Amazon Big Spring Sale deals you can get right now
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day sale may arrive earlier than usual this year, but there’s a deal event happening much sooner: Amazon’s annual Big Spring Sale, which is happening March 25th through the 31st....

item.title: Microsoft hires the team of Sequoia-backed AI collaboration platform, Cove
item.description: AI collaboration startup Cove is shutting down after its team joined Microsoft, with service ending April 1 and customer data set for deletion.

item.title: Philips’ new audio gear brings back the bright, bold colors of the ’80s
item.description: Not even electronics were able to escape the dominant '80s aesthetic of garishly bright colors. Both Sony and Philips offered devices wrapped in yellow plastic during that era, but Philips has...

item.title: Oh, you think the government will regulate Kalshi and Polymarket? Wanna bet?
item.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has a problem: It's not very good at policing insider trading. And insider trading has become a pressing concern for prediction markets. Even Kalshi's...

item.title: DOD says Anthropic’s ‘red lines’ make it an ‘unacceptable risk to national security’
item.description: The Defense Department said concerns that Anthropic might "attempt to disable its technology" during "warfighting operations" validate its decision to label the AI firm a supply-chain risk.

item.title: The hits keep coming in Spider-Man: Brand New Day’s first trailer

item.title: The great EV pullback: all the obstacles, cancellations, and delays
item.description: The auto industry bet big on electric vehicles, but now those ambitious goals are falling apart. Demand was already slowing down when Donald Trump took office and took an ax to pro-EV policy: the...

item.title: Nvidia has lost the plot with gamers
item.description: Nvidia surely thought it was doing a good thing for gamers by "upgrading" the faces of our favorite video game characters. But that just shows how much the company has lost the plot. Nvidia...

item.title: The Download: The Pentagon’s new AI plans, and next-gen nuclear reactors
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. The Pentagon is planning for AI companies to train on...

item.title: DLSS 5: Has Nvidia’s AI graphics technology gone too far?
item.description: Nvidia has revealed a new “3D guided neural rendering model” called DLSS 5 that can change a game’s lighting and materials in real-time, and… many gamers aren’t happy. From DLSS 5 memes to...

item.title: Critical Unpatched Telnetd Flaw (CVE-2026-32746) Enables Unauthenticated Root RCE
